chunks.text: d Home Viptos Viptos Home Summary Screenshots Publications Downloads Mailing lists (Ptolemy/Viptos) Contact Info Skip to sidebar Linux How-To Below are the steps that worked in February, 2011 with RHEL Linux and Java 1.6. See Ptolemy II PtinyOS Domai

L Linux and Java 1.6. See Ptolemy II PtinyOS Domain Installation Notes for details. Download the devel via svn and build. See http://chess.eecs.berkeley.edu/ptexternal : svn co https://source.eecs.berkeley.edu/svn/chess/ptII/trunk ptII cd ptII expor

rkeley.edu/svn/chess/ptII/trunk ptII cd ptII export PTII=`pwd` ./configure make Set up ptinyos1.x: cd $PTII mkdir -p vendors/ptinyos cd $PTII/vendors/ptinyos wget http://ptolemy.berkeley.edu/viptos/viptos1.0/tinyos-1.x-2007-01-17.tar.gz tar -zxf tiny

ptos1.0/tinyos-1.x-2007-01-17.tar.gz tar -zxf tinyos-1.x-2007-01-17.tar.gz Download nesc 1.2.8 from http://sourceforge.net/projects/nescc/files/nescc/v1.2.8/ . We use nesc-1.2.8 to avoid /usr/include/pthread.h:502: requested alignment is not a const

/pthread.h:502: requested alignment is not a constant , see http://bugs.gentoo.org/145870 . cd $PTII/vendors/ptinyos wget "http://downloads.sourceforge.net/project/nescc/nescc/v1.2.8/nesc-1.2.8a.tar.gz?r=http%3A%2F%2Fsourceforge.net%2Fprojects%2Fnesc

z?r=http%3A%2F%2Fsourceforge.net%2Fprojects%2Fnescc%2Ffiles%2Fnescc%2Fv1.2.8%2F&ts=1298084236&use_mirror=superb-sea2" tar -zxf nesc-1.2.8a.tar.gz cd nesc-1.2.8 ./configure make sudo make install Set up the environment variables export TOSROOT=$PTII/v

p the environment variables export TOSROOT=$PTII/vendors/ptinyos/tinyos-1.x export TOSDIR=$TOSROOT/tos export PTINYOS_MOMLROOT=$PTII/vendors/ptinyos/moml Reconfigure: cd $PTII ./configure Configure and install the TinyOS 1.x nesC tools. cd $TOSROOT/t

d install the TinyOS 1.x nesC tools. cd $TOSROOT/tools/src/ncc ./Bootstrap ./configure make sudo make install See if you have installed TinyOS 1.x and nesC correctly cd $TOSROOT/apps/Blink make pc ./build/pc/main.exe 1 Unzip the pre-generated librari

uild/pc/main.exe 1 Unzip the pre-generated libraries and applications cd $PTII/vendors/ptinyos cat $PTII/ptolemy/domains/ptinyos/util/nc2moml/nc2moml-tinyos-1.1.15Dec2005cvs-1.tar.gz | gunzip | tar -xvf - cd $PTII/vendors/ptinyos cat $PTII/ptolemy/do

vf - cd $PTII/vendors/ptinyos cat $PTII/ptolemy/domains/ptinyos/util/ncapp2moml/ncapp2moml-tinyos-1.1.15Dec2005cvs-1.tar.gz | gunzip | tar -xvf - Run the demo, check standard output for errors. The LEDs in the icon should blink $PTII/bin/viptos $PTI
EDs in the icon should blink $PTII/bin/viptos $PTII/ptolemy/domains/ptinyos/demo/SenseToLeds/SenseToLeds-InWireless.xml Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all rights reserved.
